Klasse Task

java.lang.Object
model.Task
public class Task extends Object
Represents a single task in the project management tool.

This class is a pure data object (Model) and contains no GUI logic. It strictly applies the principle of encapsulation.

    Felder
    Modifikator und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung
    private String

    The assigned users for this task.

    comments
    The comments associated with this task.

    The creation date of this task.

    description
    The description of this task.
    private String
    status
    The current status of this task.
    private int
    timeSpentInSeconds
    The total time spent on this task in seconds.

  • Felddetails

    • title

      private String title
      The title of this task.

    • description

      private String description
      The description of this task.

    • status

      private String status
      The current status of this task.

    • creationDate

      private String creationDate
      The creation date of this task.

    • deadline

      private String deadline
      The deadline of this task.

    • timeSpentInSeconds

      private int timeSpentInSeconds
      The total time spent on this task in seconds.

    • assignees

      private String assignees
      The assigned users for this task.

    • comments

      private String comments
      The comments associated with this task.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Task

      public Task(String title, String description, String status)
      Creates a basic task with title, description, and status.

      Time spent is initialized to 0, and other fields are initialized to empty strings.

      Parameter:
      title - the title of the task
      description - the detailed description of the task
      status - the initial status of the task

    • Task

      public Task(String title, String description, String status, int timeSpentInSeconds, String creationDate, String deadline, String assignees, String comments)
      Creates a task with all available attributes.
      Parameter:
      title - the title of the task
      description - the detailed description of the task
      status - the status of the task
      timeSpentInSeconds - the time spent on the task in seconds
      creationDate - the creation date of the task
      deadline - the deadline of the task
      assignees - the assignees of the task, null treated as empty string
      comments - the initial comments, null treated as empty string

  • Methodendetails

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Gets the title of this task.
      Gibt zurück:
      the title

    • setTitle

      public void setTitle(String title)
      Sets the title of this task.
      Parameter:
      title - the new title

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Gets the description of this task.
      Gibt zurück:
      the description

    • setDescription

      public void setDescription(String description)
      Sets the description of this task.
      Parameter:
      description - the new description

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Gets the status of this task.
      Gibt zurück:
      the status

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Sets the status of this task.
      Parameter:
      status - the new status

    • getTimeSpentInSeconds

      public int getTimeSpentInSeconds()
      Gets the time spent on this task in seconds.
      Gibt zurück:
      the time spent in seconds

    • addTimeInSeconds

      public void addTimeInSeconds(int seconds)
      Adds the specified amount of time to the total time spent on this task.
      Parameter:
      seconds - the time to add in seconds

    • setTimeSpentInSeconds

      public void setTimeSpentInSeconds(int seconds)
      Sets the time spent on this task in seconds.
      Parameter:
      seconds - the new time spent in seconds

    • getCreationDate

      public String getCreationDate()
      Gets the creation date of this task.
      Gibt zurück:
      the creation date

    • getDeadline

      public String getDeadline()
      Gets the deadline of this task.
      Gibt zurück:
      the deadline

    • setDeadline

      public void setDeadline(String deadline)
      Sets the deadline of this task.
      Parameter:
      deadline - the new deadline

    • getAssignees

      public String getAssignees()
      Gets the assignees of this task.
      Gibt zurück:
      the assignees

    • setAssignees

      public void setAssignees(String assignees)
      Sets the assignees of this task.
      Parameter:
      assignees - the new assignees, may be null

    • getComments

      public String getComments()
      Gets the comments of this task.
      Gibt zurück:
      the comments

    • addComment

      public void addComment(String author, String text, String date)
      Adds a newly formatted HTML comment to this task.
      Parameter:
      author - the author of the comment
      text - the content of the comment
      date - the date the comment was made

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this task.
      Setzt außer Kraft:
      toString in Klasse Object
      Gibt zurück:
      a string representation including the title and status
